title: All Dashboards
content:
# All Dashboards

To see a list of all Telemetry and Log dashboards available, click on the **Monitoring** menu item on the left hand side bar.

You can then access all the Logs and Telemetry information available on the Kelvin Platform through a centralized Grafana Dashboard.
